description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 3 hrs 55 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 58 mins. His work was spread across 5 projects, and his most-used languages were Java (42%), Bash (18%), Python (14%), and Markdown (14%). No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded this week.
